title: Mumbai、Maharashtra — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Mumbai、Maharashtra的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Mumbai是Maharashtra的一個城市，人口約20,961,000。India’s financial capital and largest city, home to Bollywood, the Bombay Stock Exchange, and a vibrant coastal urban culture.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
